sql_array: CREATE TABLE logs (`event_time` DateTime('UTC'), `event_id` UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_time;
UPDATE logs SET event_id = 3 WHERE event_time = toDateTime('2023-10-10 10:00:00', 'UTC');
SELECT event_time, event_id FROM logs WHERE event_time >= toDateTime('2023-10-10 00:00:00', 'UTC') AND event_time < toDateTime('2023-10-11 00:00:00', 'UTC');
SELECT toDateTime(event_time, 'Europe/London') AS london_time, toDateTime(event_time, 'Asia/Istanbul') AS istanbul_time FROM logs;
